name: Cadence
description:
A cheery woman with two dark blue horns sprouting from her short, wavy pale hair coiffed in curly twin tails with dark blue streaks. Her amethyst eyes sparkle with energy, and on one ear, she seems to be carrying some kind of curved stick ending in a sort of fuzzy nub held in front of her mouth, apparently designed to speak into it.

She wears a showy, slutty blue attire made of intermixing straps, fishnets, and sheer fabric, the brazen outfit barely covering her smooth, lightly tanned skin and leaving her hefty breasts almost on full display. In addition, the scanty garment sports an inviting cleavage window eye-catchingly accented by a gleaming heart tattoo, the bra-like top held up by a choker around her neck decorated with a heart-shaped pendant.

A pair of batlike wings stretch from her back, her fingers are entirely hidden by elegant stark-white gloves, and her lithe arms are clad in long, tight-fitting sleeves made of a mix of sheer fabric and fishnets, while the wrist parts consist of a layer of cutesy, fluffy material. The succubus' waist and hips are nearly on full display, her private parts only barely covered by shiny micro shorts that make no effort to hide the plainly visible straps of a thong and garters, the raunchy piece of clothing framing a simple, stylized heart tattoo that rests over her abdomen.

Behind her curvy hips sways a demonic tail with a white spade and a discreet small ribbon tied to the end of it. Her long legs are covered by fishnet thigh-high garters quite similar in design to the arm parts, while her feet are concealed by a pair of white high heels with a blue bottom.
